title: libpod: modernize state test
body:
Use `t.Helper`, `t.TempDir`, and `t.Cleanup` in `getEmptySqliteState`,
simplifying its code and its users.
    
Simplify `runForAllStates`: remove redundant `t.Fail` call, and move
getEmptySqliteState call under t.Run.

(This was part of something I worked a while back and haven't finished, but it makes sense per se)

#### Checklist

Ensure you have completed the following checklist for your pull request to be reviewed:

comments.body: Hm, I probably miss something since I'm new to this code, but how is the `state` closed after your patch? Previously, the `state.close()` was called, but that's no longer a case and there is no cleanup registered afaik.
[NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.

> Hm, I probably miss something since I'm new to this code, but how is the `state` closed after your patch? Previously, the `state.close()` was called, but that's no longer a case and there is no cleanup registered afaik.

You are right, I missed this part. Fixed now.
